title: Section 75
content: The provisions of this Part shall apply in relation to the apportionment of the assets and liabilities immediately before the appointed day of every Part A or Part B State the whole or any part of whose territories is transferred to another State or becomes 1[Union territory] by virtue of the provisions of Part II; and the expression "existing State" shall accordingly be construed to mean any such Part A State or Part B State.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the Adaptation of Laws (No. 1) Order, 1956, for "Part C State".
